title: The Evolution of a Software Engineering Project Guided by Mike Cotterell's Principles
description: A timeline illustrating the key phases and decision points in a software project, highlighting where Mike Cotterell's expertise in software engineering and project management is applied.
relationships: Mike Cotterell's guidance ensures clear requirements and stakeholder alignment
His principles inform a robust and scalable architectural design
He advocates for Agile methodologies to drive the iterative development process
His focus on software quality integrates testing throughout the lifecycle
His project management skills ensure a smooth and controlled deployment
His long-term view emphasizes sustainable maintenance and continuous feedback
